小说又名：《重生拒绝扶弟魔，被前妻妹妹倒追》《开局85顿顿有肉，前妻一家馋哭
》《开局全家被榨干，老实人我不当了》
陆山河重生了，回到了1985年娶苏婉晴的那一天。
再一次面对着丈母亲加彩礼的要求，陆山河一挥手表示这婚自己不结了。
邻里亲戚觉得陆山河干活干傻了，居然放弃了有城市户口长相漂亮的苏晚晴。
只有陆山河人间清醒，前世和苏晚晴结婚后，这女人就是个扶弟魔，把家里翻空了往娘家搬，就差没把陆山河卖了换钱资助弟弟。
陆山河还被苏晚晴戴了一辈子绿帽子，白给别人养了四十多年便宜儿子。
为了凑够苏晚晴的彩礼，陆山河父亲卖血感染肝炎肝癌而死，小妹辍学上山采药失足离世。
重活一世，陆山河发誓要远离扶弟魔，迎娶白月光，让家人过上富足的生活。
看着遍地黄金处处是机会的八九十年代，陆山河下定决心要成为时代的主人！
（前期铺垫一些慢热，各位大佬不喜勿喷）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2f3e1efa5b2949f9de69598793898d40","author":"红糖锅盔","author_id":"","book_id":"7217772761081449484","book_name":"开局全家被榨干，老实人我不当了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7218066858824598076","read_count":"18085","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4618484"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"2232","tags":"都市种田,都市,重生,多女主,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a8f1d5f388b5d3105f64a1405dea922a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779310418&x-signature=UoZZIpWuQuC9mkogdPclXzrk%2FuM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1392405485203048","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.9472335e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032204533866AC79FED97ADA1161DA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读47小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":131473,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":170945,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":20545},"user_action":{"autho
